title: Agents Are Just Loops
summary: AWS Developers demonstrates building AI agents using the open-source Strands Agents SDK. The video shows four progressively complex agent examples: a single-tool agent, a multi-tool agent, an agent with observability hooks, and a multi-agent orchestrator. All agents follow the core loop pattern of reasoning, tool selection, execution, and repetition.
